title: MERCH New Balance Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: [MERCH] New Balance Evangelion             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Wed Sep 06, 2017 11:30 am So, was reading the news when I happened along this gem: these awesome new shoes going on sale in Japan and China this week. They've got a fairly tame color pallette, considering they're inspired by Evangelion, and they also come is cool packaging with as well at the reasonable price of ¥10,867 (or $100). The article has some pictures and they certainly look wort the price.

[]: Re: [MERCH] New Balance Evangelion             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Sep 06, 2017 12:48 pm They just look like shoes to me. What's supposed to be special about them aside from branding?

[]: Re: [MERCH] New Balance Evangelion             Quote Post by Joseki » Wed Sep 06, 2017 1:17 pm I don't like NBs and those are just as bad as the others.

[]: Re: [MERCH] New Balance Evangelion             Quote Post by Cybermat47 » Wed Sep 06, 2017 6:46 pm So you can just slap the word "Evangelion" on anything and it'll be considered Evangelion -themed?

[]: Re: [MERCH] New Balance Evangelion             Quote Post by Joseki » Thu Sep 07, 2017 4:12 am Cybermat47 wrote: So you can just slap the word "Evangelion" on anything and it'll be considered Evangelion -themed?

[]: Re: [MERCH] New Balance Evangelion             Quote Post by Joy Evangelion » Sat Sep 09, 2017 5:30 pm I have a purple shirt. I should go to a con and sell it to someone as a "Shogouki Shirt." I think they're quite ugly myself, but I'm not a New Balance guy either; give me some Mizunos or Onitsuka Tigers, plz. This is a bit of a missed opportunity though; surely I'm not the only Evageek that has ever thought that it looks like the Evas themselves are wearing sneakers? Why not come out with some shoes that would emulate them?
